items.title: code-review-graph
items.description: Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.
items.description_zh: MCP 和 CLI 的本地优先代码智能图。构建代码库的持久地图，以便 AI 编码工具仅读取重要内容，并在评论和大型存储库工作流程上进行基准上下文缩减。

items.title: ktransformers
items.description: A Flexible Framework for Experiencing Heterogeneous LLM Inference/Fine-tune Optimizations
items.description_zh: 用于体验异构 LLM 推理/微调优化的灵活框架

items.title: ai-engineering-from-scratch
items.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.
items.description_zh: 学习它。建造它。寄给别人。

items.title: voicebox
items.description: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.
items.description_zh: 开源人工智能语音工作室。克隆、指令、创造。

items.title: wigolo
items.description: The go-to web for your AI coding agent — local-first search, fetch, crawl & research over MCP. No API keys, no cloud, $0/query. Public beta.
items.description_zh: AI 编码代理的首选网络 — 通过 MCP 进行本地优先搜索、获取、爬网和研究。没有 API 密钥，没有云，每次查询 0 美元。公开测试版。

items.title: jellium-desktop
items.description: An unofficial desktop client for Jellyfin
items.description_zh: Jellyfin 的非官方桌面客户端

items.title: copilot-sdk
items.description: Multi-platform SDK for integrating GitHub Copilot Agent into apps and services
items.description_zh: 用于将 GitHub Copilot Agent 集成到应用程序和服务中的多平台 SDK

items.title: posthog
items.description: 🦔 PostHog is the leading platform for building self-driving products. Our developer tools – AI observability, analytics, session replay, flags, experiments, error tracking, logs, and more – capture all the context agents need to diagnose problems, uncover opportunities, and ship fixes. Steer it all from Slack, web, desktop, or the MCP.
items.description_zh: 🦔 PostHog 是构建自动驾驶产品的领先平台。我们的开发人员工具——人工智能可观察性、分析、会话重放、标记、实验、错误跟踪、日志等——捕获代理诊断问题、发现机会和发布修复所需的所有上下文。从 Slack、Web、桌面或 MCP 掌控一切。

items.title: terminal
items.description: The new Windows Terminal and the original Windows console host, all in the same place!
items.description_zh: 新的 Windows 终端和原来的 Windows 控制台主机都在同一个地方！

items.title: AstrBot
items.description: AI Agent Assistant & development framework that integrates lots of IM platforms, LLMs, plugins and AI feature, and can be your openclaw alternative. ✨
items.description_zh: AI Agent Assistant & 开发框架，集成了大量 IM 平台、LLM、插件和 AI 功能，可以成为您的 openclaw 替代方案。 ✨

items.title: cua
items.description: Scale computer-use 2.0 with open-source drivers, cross-OS fleets, and benchmarks for training, evaluation, and data generation.
items.description_zh: 通过开源驱动程序、跨操作系统队列以及培训、评估和数据生成基准来扩展计算机使用 2.0。

items.title: kimi-cli
items.description: Kimi Code CLI is your next CLI agent.
items.description_zh: Kimi Code CLI 是您的下一个 CLI 代理。

items.title: build-your-own-x
items.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.
items.description_zh: 通过从头开始重新创建您最喜欢的技术来掌握编程。
